title: Submission
description: A single input into a CDS Issue at M1 (a concern, proposal, objection, evidence, comment, or system signal). The raw records created before/at intake; near-duplicates are linked via duplicate_of, never discarded. Proposed candidate contract (CDS Module 1 shape from specs/01-cds.md) — NOT RATIFIED.

author_id.description: node-id:participant-id of the submitter; for type=signal this is the originating monitor (e.g. node:frs-monitor)

source_system.description: set when type=signal: which system raised it (FRS/ITC/COS/OAD); null for human submissions

source_ref.description: ref to the originating record when type=signal

embedding.description: [DEFERRED] vector of the submission's meaning, used for cosine-similarity de-duplication at M1

duplicate_of.description: if flagged a near-duplicate, the submission_id of the retained canonical entry (this one is kept and linked, not discarded)
